name: Bryce Resort
description: Bryce Resort is a place to play pickleball in Mount Jackson, VA. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Shenandoah County Park
description: Shenandoah County Park is a place to play pickleball in Maurertown, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Shrine Mont
description: Shrine Mont is a place to play pickleball in Orkney Springs, VA. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Strasburg Town Park
description: Strasburg Town Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Strasburg, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: The Shenandoah County Community Center
description: The Shenandoah County Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mount Jackson, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.
fees: Fee required — $5.00 per player per session
